narrative:
New Franklin 2-B (precinct in Summit County) has 850 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.9%, a modest Republican lean of 4.6 percentage points.
